upcoming.title: Milan AI Tech Week: Founder & Investor Aperitivo
upcoming.description: A highly curated, intimate aperitivo during Milan AI Tech Week. Founders, investors, operators and creatives — venture meets conversation in the heart of Milan. Hosted by Yorkseed & EdgeCraft Group.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Connect: Founding Member Roundtable #1
upcoming.description: An intimate, high-signal virtual gathering for founders and investors in it for the long game. No panels, no pitches — just candid conversation among a carefully curated group. One-time open preview before it closes to Founding Members only.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable
upcoming.description: Off-the-record virtual roundtable for 30 accredited investors in HealthTech. No pitches — candid strategy on deal flow, fund performance, and what's actually scaling in Digital Health, BioTech, MedTech, and FemTech.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Paris Spring Social: Founders & Investors Evening
upcoming.description: An intimate evening bringing together founders, investors, operators, and ecosystem leaders for meaningful conversations and high-signal connections in Paris.

upcoming.title: The Oasis: Human Flourishing in the Age of AI
upcoming.description: Day 1 of The Oasis at Yorkseed House. How do we ensure technology advances human flourishing? Founders, builders, and creatives at Belong NYC during NY Tech Week.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed House · NY Tech Week Pop-Up at Belong NYC
upcoming.venue: Belong NYC · 218 Lafayette St, 2nd Floor, New York
upcoming.description: Yorkseed House returns during NY Tech Week with a curated multi-day pop-up at Belong NYC in SoHo. A central gathering point for founders, investors, operators, and ecosystem leaders throughout the week. Hosted by Yorkseed, Belong NYC, Flowstate, and Elevate.

upcoming.title: The Oasis: Future of Work
upcoming.description: Day 2 of The Oasis. What happens to work as AI and automation accelerate? Honest conversation about opportunity and uncertainty at Yorkseed House.

upcoming.title: Intersection: AI + Blockchain
upcoming.description: Panel and Q&A with VCs, operators, and founders on the practical realities of AI and Blockchain converging. Networking follows. Part of Yorkseed House at NY Tech Week.

upcoming.title: Ugly Talk: The Future of Fashion & Beauty Tech
upcoming.description: Beauty tech is booming but the category is getting louder, not clearer. This room is for founders and investors who want to separate signal from noise and figure out which trends are truly shaping the future of beauty tech.

upcoming.title: The Oasis: Finding Ikigai
upcoming.description: Day 3 of The Oasis. Using ikigai to explore purpose and meaning. A space to slow down and reconnect with the bigger why during NY Tech Week.

upcoming.title: Fintech & AI Pitch Forum
upcoming.description: Curated fintech and AI startup pitches, investor panel, and high-signal networking during NY Tech Week. Application required — founders raising, investors deploying.

upcoming.title: Elevate Recovery Lounge at Yorkseed House
upcoming.description: Full-day wellness pop-up at Yorkseed House. Zero gravity chairs, compression boots, red light therapy, and eye massage masks. 15-minute sessions throughout the day.

upcoming.title: Venture Salon: Founders & Investors
upcoming.venue: Nomadworks Rooftop, 1216 Broadway, New York, NY 10001
upcoming.description: During NY Tech Week, In Pulse and Yorkseed brought together a curated group of 75 founders, investors, and AI ecosystem leaders for an invite-only Venture Salon in Manhattan, featuring a live founder pitch competition judged by VCs and angels.

upcoming.title: The Oasis: Emerging Technology
upcoming.description: Day 5 and closing session of The Oasis. What's genuinely exciting, what's hype, and what threads are worth pulling on next. The best way to end NY Tech Week.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Sunset Salon · DCD APAC Bali
upcoming.location: SOORA Speakeasy Bar · Nusa Dua, Bali
upcoming.description: Yorkseed's first gathering in Bali — a curated sunset evening during DCD Connect APAC for founders, investors, family offices, infrastructure operators, and ecosystem leaders. No panels. No agenda. Just the right conversations.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable — Wellness, Nutrition & Supplements
upcoming.spots: Accredited investors, LPs, GPs & healthcare execs · Application required
upcoming.description: Private virtual roundtable on preventive health and wellness investing — personalized nutrition, evidence-based supplements, and longevity. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors for accredited investors, fund managers, and healthcare executives.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Venture Social
upcoming.venue: The Ready Cantina, 112 E 11th St, New York
upcoming.description: Join founders, investors, operators, and ecosystem builders for an evening of meaningful conversations above the New York City skyline. Includes 2 months complimentary Yorkseed Connect access.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Paris Ecosystem Mixer · RAISE Summit Pitch Roulette
upcoming.venue: Osha BWB, 2 Rue de la Paix, 75002 Paris
upcoming.description: Opening reception and Pitch Roulette kicking off Yorkseed House during RAISE Summit Paris — 2 minutes, 1 shot. Founders scaling bold ideas, investors backing long-term vision, ecosystem allies bridging global corridors, at Osha BWB near the Louvre.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed RAISE Summit · The Capital Table Lunch
upcoming.venue: Flam's, 62 Rue des Lombards, Paris · Private Dining Room
upcoming.description: A curated founder and investor brunch during RAISE Summit Paris. With-traction founders, previously funded founders, investors, and select ecosystem leaders discussing fundraising, growth, and the future of venture capital.

upcoming.title: HOT or NOT: Is Your Startup Fundable or Just Interesting? — Wellness, Nutrition & Supplements
upcoming.spots: Founders pitch; open to investors, healthcare leaders & operators
upcoming.description: Live pitch-and-feedback session for founders building in wellness, nutrition, supplements, and longevity. Selected founders pitch to a panel of investors and healthcare experts, with real-time audience feedback. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable — Clinical Trials
upcoming.spots: Accredited investors, LPs, GPs & healthcare execs · Application required
upcoming.description: Private virtual roundtable on the transformation of clinical trials — AI-driven patient recruitment, decentralized trials, real-world evidence, and inclusive research infrastructure. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors for accredited investors, fund managers, and healthcare executives.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Connect: Founding Member Roundtable #2
upcoming.description: The second Yorkseed Founding Member Roundtable — an intimate, high-signal virtual gathering exclusive to Founding Members. No panels, no pitches, just candid conversation among a curated group of founders and investors.

upcoming.title: HOT or NOT: Is Your Startup Fundable or Just Interesting? — Clinical Trials
upcoming.spots: Founders pitch; open to investors, clinicians & pharma leaders
upcoming.description: Live pitch-and-feedback session for founders building in clinical trial innovation — AI-driven recruitment, decentralized trials, real-world data, and inclusive research infrastructure. Selected founders pitch to investors and healthcare experts. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable — Men's Health
upcoming.spots: Accredited investors, LPs, GPs & healthcare execs · Application required
upcoming.description: Private virtual roundtable on men's health investing — testosterone and hormone optimization, men's mental health and loneliness solutions, and digital-first preventive care. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors for accredited investors, fund managers, and healthcare executives.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable — Mental Health
upcoming.spots: Accredited investors, LPs, GPs & healthcare execs · Application required
upcoming.description: Private virtual roundtable on mental health investing — AI-driven access and personalization, employer-driven behavioral health, integrated care models, and non-pharmaceutical interventions. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors for accredited investors, fund managers, and healthcare executives.

upcoming.title: HOT or NOT: Is Your Startup Fundable or Just Interesting? — Mental Health
upcoming.spots: Founders pitch; open to investors, clinicians & benefits leaders
upcoming.description: Live pitch-and-feedback session for founders building in behavioral health and mental health innovation. Selected founders pitch to investors, clinicians, employers, and health systems, with real-time audience feedback. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors.

upcoming.title: Venture Vitality: HealthTech Investor Roundtable — Women's Health
upcoming.spots: Accredited investors, LPs, GPs & healthcare execs · Application required
upcoming.description: Private virtual roundtable on women's health investing — menopause and healthy aging, fertility and reproductive health, and AI-powered personalized preventive care. Co-hosted by Yorkseed & Health Board Advisors for accredited investors, fund managers, and healthcare executives.

upcoming.title: The Yorkseed Summit Closing + Web Summit Opening Night 2026
upcoming.spots: Limited capacity · General & VIP tickets available
upcoming.description: Yorkseed's flagship Opening Night party kicking off a full week of curated events during Web Summit Lisbon 2026 — founder and investor gatherings, executive lunches, and mixers throughout the week. All-Access Week Passes available.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Executive Lunch
upcoming.venue: Venue TBA · Lisbon (shared with approved attendees)
upcoming.spots: By application · Founder, Investor & Executive tiers
upcoming.description: A curated seated lunch during Web Summit Lisbon bringing together founders, executives, investors, fund managers, family offices, and corporate leaders — no stage, no pitching, just seated introductions and relationship-driven conversation.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Capital Lunch
upcoming.description: Curated founder and investor lunch during Web Summit Lisbon 2026, part of the Yorkseed Passport Series week of programming.

upcoming.title: Yorkseed Allocator Lunch
upcoming.venue: Venue TBA · Lisbon (shared with approved attendees)
upcoming.spots: By application · Emerging Manager, Family Office & Institutional tiers
upcoming.description: A curated seated lunch during Web Summit Lisbon for LPs, GPs, emerging fund managers, family offices, and institutional investors — seated introductions and relationship-driven conversation among capital allocators.

events.title: Yorkseed House Paris · RAISE Summit 2026
events.date: Mon, Jul 6 – Fri, Jul 10, 2026 · 9:00 AM–6:00 PM daily
events.description: Yorkseed's week-long home base during RAISE Summit — open coworking, meeting space, and drop-in access for founders, investors, and operators, plus the full week's curated programming: office hours, the Opening Reception, the Capital Table Lunch, and Valois's invitation-only gatherings.

events.title: IP Office Hours for Startups & Scaleups · Yorkseed House
events.description: Office hours with Dr. Pascale Brochard and Christophe Besnard of OBWB on IP for startups and scaleups — patents, trademarks, protection strategy, and investor readiness across tech, AI, and international markets. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: Business Scaling Office Hours with Malin Nordby · Yorkseed House
events.description: Office hours with Malin Nordby, CEO of OBWB International and COO of OGMC Dubai, on the practical side of establishing, operating, and scaling a business across markets. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: The Intellectual Property Angle on AI · Yorkseed House
events.description: Office hours with Jonathan Osha, founder of OBWB and chair of the International IP5 Industry AI Task Force, on patents, IP protection strategy, and ownership for AI-enabled companies. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: IP Across Borders Office Hours · Yorkseed House
events.description: Office hours with Dr. Pascale Brochard and Christophe Besnard of OBWB on international IP strategy — patents, trademarks, and protection across markets for founders and deep tech startups expanding cross-border. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: Valois at the Louvre · Investor Night
events.description: Private invitation-only salon for family offices, LPs, GPs, fund managers, sovereign wealth funds, and institutional investors, hosted overlooking the Louvre in partnership with Valois. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: The Executive Rendez-Vous
events.description: Curated evening for C-suite executives and founders celebrating VivaTech and RAISE Summit, co-hosted with Rendez-Vous Partners, connecting Silicon Valley and France. Featured an exhibition by artist Rebekah MacKay. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: Founders & Investors Breakfast Roundtable · Yorkseed Passport Series
events.description: Intimate roundtable breakfast pairing AI founders with meaningful traction and investors actively deploying capital into AI — fundraising, enterprise adoption, product-market fit, and cross-border expansion. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: Doing AI Business in the MENA Region · Yorkseed House
events.description: Roundtable on doing AI business in the MENA region with European patent attorneys Jonathan Osha and Malin Nordby of Osha Bergman Watanabe & Burton. Part of Yorkseed House at RAISE Summit Paris 2026.

events.title: Java & Journeys: Conversations That Inspire Change
Venture Salon: A Curated Evening for Founders & Investors
Speed Pitch: Guaranteed 1:1 Meetings With Investors
events.description: Guaranteed 1:1 meetings with top investors for pre-seed to Series A founders. Every founder meets 3 matched investors in 8-min one-on-one meetings. 36 spots only. Hosted by The Startup Station — Yorkseed is a community partner.
events.venue: New York, NY · Address on approval

events.title: Yacht Party · #NYTechWeek Closing Party
events.date: Sun, Jun 7, 2026 · NY Tech Week Closing
events.description: The fifth annual NY Tech Week Closing Yacht Party. 1,000+ attendees, DJs, drinks, and rooftop views of the Manhattan skyline. Hosted by The Neo Club & Tavern Community — Yorkseed is a community partner.
events.venue: Pier 83, W 42nd St & 12th Ave, New York

events.title: Robotics Competitions · ARCLeague Season Zero
events.description: The world's first full-body controlled robot fighting event. Participants wear armor suits and control competition robots through their own physical movements. ARCLeague Season Zero — a new category of sport at the intersection of robotics, gaming, and physical performance.
